extension.name: pkg_jem
extension.author: JEM Community
extension.notes: Fixed duplicate JemHelper declarations that could cause fatal errors during upgrades. [Issue #2242](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2242);Updated Update Check to follow the Joomla administrator template colors. [Issue #2243](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2243);Restored upgrade support from JEM 4.4.x. [Issue #2247](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2247);Added validation for associated article title formats. [Issue #2248](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2248);Improved import security configuration and diagnostics. [Issue #2249](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2249);Expanded import and export workflows, profiles, venue data and map markers. [Issue #2250](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2250);Restored the hits column in the backend events list. [Issue #2251](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2251);Added attachment download statistics and event visit dates. [Issue #2252](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/issues/2252);Fixed Nominatim requests and isolated event and venue parameters. [Commit f199043](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/commit/f199043cd226d70f95b502d5778af4e3b20a3a16);Corrected the "Show my location" wording. [Commit 0a26eef](https://github.com/jemproject/JEM-Project/commit/0a26eef790b7f1b32007cc1da02752b0212ee10f)
